requirement_topic.en: SII Certification and Israel Electricity Authority Approval — Mandatory Market-Entry Gates
requirement_topic.zh: SII认证及以色列电力局审批——强制市场准入门槛
requirement_topic.zht: SII認證及以色列電力局審批——強制市場准入門檻

summary.en: The Standards Institution of Israel (SII) is the national standards body and conformity assessment authority for Israel, and an ISO member body. SII publishes mandatory SI standards adopting IEC standards for electrical equipment, including EV supply equipment. Products that fall within the scope of a mandatory SI standard must be SII-certified or carry a valid declaration of conformity to the applicable SI standard before being sold or installed in Israel. The Israel Electricity Authority (IEA) is the independent regulator of the electricity sector; it issues licenses and sets technical requirements for EV charging operators and grid-connected installations. The Israel Electric Corporation (IEC) governs physical grid-connection approval for all grid-tied equipment. GB/T 27930 communication and GB/T 18487.1-2023 documentation alone are not accepted by SII or the Electricity Authority as conformity evidence. Exporters must confirm the SII certification path, applicable SI standard, and IEA licensing requirements for the specific charger type and rated power before shipment.
summary.zh: 以色列标准协会（SII）是以色列国家标准化机构和合格评定机构，同时也是ISO成员机构。SII为电气设备（包括电动汽车供电设备）发布采纳IEC标准的强制SI标准。属于强制SI标准适用范围的产品须在以色列销售或安装前取得SII认证或出具适用SI标准的有效合规声明。以色列电力局（IEA）是电力行业的独立监管机构，负责为电动汽车充电运营商和并网安装颁发许可证并设定技术要求。以色列电力公司负责管理所有并网设备的物理并网审批。GB/T 27930通信和GB/T 18487.1-2023文件单独均不被SII或电力局认可为合规证据。出口商在出货前应核实具体充电桩类型和额定功率的SII认证路径、适用SI标准和IEA许可证要求。
summary.zht: 以色列標準協會（SII）是以色列國家標準化機構和合格評定機構，同時也是ISO成員機構。SII為電氣設備（包括電動汽車供電設備）發布採納IEC標準的強制SI標準。屬於強制SI標準適用範圍的產品須在以色列銷售或安裝前取得SII認證或出具適用SI標準的有效合規聲明。以色列電力局（IEA）是電力行業的獨立監管機構，負責為電動汽車充電運營商和併網安裝頒發許可證並設定技術要求。以色列電力公司負責管理所有併網設備的物理併網審批。GB/T 27930通訊和GB/T 18487.1-2023文件單獨均不被SII或電力局認可為合規證據。出口商在出貨前應核實具體充電樁類型和額定功率的SII認證路徑、適用SI標準和IEA許可證要求。

standards_or_laws: SII mandatory SI standards for electrical equipment (adopting IEC 61851, IEC 62196, IEC 61000 series)
Israel Electricity Authority licensing and technical requirements for EV charging operators
Israel Electric Corporation grid-connection approval requirements
Israeli Standards Law (mandatory standards enforcement framework)

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review during an SII or IEA conformity assessment process, but it does not by itself establish SII certification status, satisfy mandatory SI standard requirements, or substitute for Israel Electricity Authority or Israel Electric Corporation approval.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可在SII或IEA合格评定过程中支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明SII认证状态、满足强制SI标准要求，也不能替代以色列电力局或以色列电力公司的审批。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可在SII或IEA合格評定過程中支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明SII認證狀態、滿足強制SI標準要求，也不能替代以色列電力局或以色列電力公司的審批。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should map the Israel importer, HS code, charger type and rated power, radio or smart-metering functions, cable and coupler accessories, IEC safety and EMC reports, Hebrew and English labelling, and Israel Electricity Authority licensing requirements before asserting that a charger is Israel-ready. GB/T 27930 is not accepted as EV charging communication evidence in Israel; GB/T 18487.1-2023 alone does not satisfy SII mandatory SI standard requirements. The SII certification path for the specific EV charger type should be confirmed with SII or an SII-accredited certification body before shipment.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称充电桩可进入以色列前，应明确以色列进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型和额定功率、无线或智能计量功能、电缆及耦合器附件、IEC安全/EMC报告、希伯来语和英语标签，以及以色列电力局许可证要求。GB/T 27930不被以色列认可为电动汽车充电通信证据；GB/T 18487.1-2023单独不满足SII强制SI标准要求。应在出货前向SII或SII认可的认证机构确认具体电动汽车充电桩类型的SII认证路径。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱充電樁可進入以色列前，應明確以色列進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型和額定功率、無線或智能計量功能、電纜及耦合器附件、IEC安全/EMC報告、希伯來語和英語標籤，以及以色列電力局許可證要求。GB/T 27930不被以色列認可為電動汽車充電通訊證據；GB/T 18487.1-2023單獨不滿足SII強制SI標準要求。應在出貨前向SII或SII認可的認證機構確認具體電動汽車充電樁類型的SII認證路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SII certification or declaration of conformity to the applicable mandatory SI standard is required before sale or installation; Israel Electricity Authority licensing and Israel Electric Corporation grid-connection approval are mandatory for grid-tied installations; GB/T 27930 comms and GB/T 18487.1-2023 alone are not accepted
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not an SII certification substitute; GB/T 27930 is not accepted as EV charging communication evidence in Israel

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Israel market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the SII certification path for the specific product type with SII or an SII-accredited body, address IEC safety and EMC evidence, Hebrew and English labelling, and obtain Israel Electricity Authority and Israel Electric Corporation approvals for grid-connected installations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足以色列市场准入。应向SII或SII认可机构核实具体产品类型的SII认证路径，处理IEC安全/EMC证据、希伯来语和英语标签，并为并网安装获取以色列电力局和以色列电力公司审批。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足以色列市場准入。應向SII或SII認可機構核實具體產品類型的SII認證路徑，處理IEC安全/EMC證據、希伯來語和英語標籤，並為併網安裝獲取以色列電力局和以色列電力公司審批。

requirement_topic.en: Israel EV Policy — National EV Adoption Targets and Charging Infrastructure Expansion
requirement_topic.zh: 以色列电动汽车政策——国家电动汽车普及目标及充电基础设施扩建
requirement_topic.zht: 以色列電動汽車政策——國家電動汽車普及目標及充電基礎設施擴建

summary.en: Israel has adopted national targets to increase electric vehicle adoption as part of its broader decarbonization strategy. The Israeli government has set targets to phase out the sale of new petrol and diesel passenger vehicles by 2030 and to expand public EV charging infrastructure across the country. The Ministry of Energy and Infrastructure and the Israel Electricity Authority jointly oversee EV charging policy and infrastructure licensing. The government-driven EV push creates strong procurement demand for IEC-standard charging equipment from public-sector projects and private operators, but does not automatically reduce conformity assessment, SII certification, or grid-connection obligations for imported chargers. All EV chargers installed in Israel must meet applicable SII mandatory SI standards regardless of origin.
summary.zh: 以色列已采纳国家目标，作为更广泛去碳化战略的一部分，提高电动汽车普及率。以色列政府设定目标，在2030年前逐步停售新汽油和柴油乘用车，并扩建全国公共电动汽车充电基础设施。能源与基础设施部和以色列电力局共同监督电动汽车充电政策和基础设施许可。政府主导的电动汽车推广为公共部门项目和私营运营商的IEC标准充电设备采购创造了强劲需求，但不会自动减少进口充电桩的合格评定、SII认证或并网接入义务。无论产地如何，所有在以色列安装的电动汽车充电桩均须满足适用的SII强制SI标准。
summary.zht: 以色列已採納國家目標，作為更廣泛去碳化戰略的一部分，提高電動汽車普及率。以色列政府設定目標，在2030年前逐步停售新汽油和柴油乘用車，並擴建全國公共電動汽車充電基礎設施。能源與基礎設施部和以色列電力局共同監督電動汽車充電政策和基礎設施許可。政府主導的電動汽車推廣為公共部門項目和私營運營商的IEC標準充電設備採購創造了強勁需求，但不會自動減少進口充電樁的合格評定、SII認證或併網接入義務。無論產地如何，所有在以色列安裝的電動汽車充電樁均須滿足適用的SII強制SI標準。

standards_or_laws: Israeli government EV adoption targets — phase-out of new ICE vehicle sales by 2030
Israel Electricity Authority licensing framework for EV charging operators
Ministry of Energy and Infrastructure EV infrastructure guidelines
SII mandatory SI standards for EV supply equipment

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and related state grid and charging-station standards. China's domestic push does not translate into automatic Israel market access; Chinese manufacturers must separately satisfy Israel SII certification, IEC connector, IEA licensing, and Israel Electric Corporation grid-connection requirements even when their home-market volumes are large.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及相关国家电网和充电站标准管理。中国国内推广不能自动转换为以色列市场准入；中国制造商即便国内销量很大，仍须单独满足以色列SII认证、IEC接口、IEA许可证和以色列电力公司并网接入要求。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及相關國家電網和充電站標準管理。中國國內推廣不能自動轉換為以色列市場准入；中國製造商即便國內銷量很大，仍須單獨滿足以色列SII認證、IEC接口、IEA許可證和以色列電力公司併網接入要求。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Israel's EV policy creates procurement opportunity but does not waive technical or conformity requirements. Chinese exporters should monitor Israeli government and Israel Electricity Authority tender and licensing announcements at gov.il, confirm project specifications before bidding, and allocate lead time for IEC testing, SII certification, connector redesign, and Israel Electric Corporation grid-connection approval documentation.
gap.zh: 以色列电动汽车政策创造了采购机会，但不豁免技术或合格评定要求。中国出口商应在gov.il关注以色列政府和以色列电力局的招标和许可公告，在投标前确认项目规范，并为IEC测试、SII认证、接口重新设计和以色列电力公司并网审批文件预留交货期。
gap.zht: 以色列電動汽車政策創造了採購機會，但不豁免技術或合格評定要求。中國出口商應在gov.il關注以色列政府和以色列電力局的招標和許可公告，在投標前確認項目規範，並為IEC測試、SII認證、接口重新設計和以色列電力公司併網審批文件預留交貨期。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — not itself a mandatory product standard; SII certification, IEA licensing, and Israel Electric Corporation grid-connection requirements remain in force independently of EV policy targets
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy does not affect Israel conformity obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Israel's EV strategy creates real procurement demand for IEC-standard chargers. Chinese exporters should treat the policy as a market signal, not a conformity shortcut, and ensure SII certification, IEC connector compliance, IEA licensing, and Israel Electric Corporation grid-connection documentation are each addressed before entering Israel tenders or shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 以色列电动汽车战略为IEC标准充电桩创造了真实采购需求。中国出口商应将该政策视为市场信号而非合规捷径，在参与以色列招标或出货前确保SII认证、IEC接口合规、IEA许可证和以色列电力公司并网审批文件各项均已妥善处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 以色列電動汽車戰略為IEC標準充電樁創造了真實採購需求。中國出口商應將該政策視為市場信號而非合規捷徑，在參與以色列招標或出貨前確保SII認證、IEC接口合規、IEA許可證和以色列電力公司併網審批文件各項均已妥善處理。
